There’s a good deal of social Washington which helps facilitate business
and politics — when you see "Pay She can give you a flavour — she’s
still much missed here!
Some invites/connections will be upon you almost immediately so |
thought it might be helpful to outline them here (these are from those who
have said they want to be in touch. JCS can give you a rundown on
others on the contacts list but you should also feel free to ask us at any
time) . The Private Office will have your full calendar for you on arrival

and a priority official contacts list.

parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
